title: Cryptool is live on Ethereum
content_html:
Cryptool is now live on Ethereum.

The same automated fundraising stack that launched on BNB Chain is now available for Ethereum projects and investors:

  • End-to-end automated fundraising
  • Syndicate management without spreadsheets
  • Launchpads spun up in seconds
  • One-click raise pool deployment
  • Native support for ETH, USDT and USDC

OTC market, portfolio and asset management, and co-investing are next.

With ETH and BNB Chain both live, Cryptool now covers the two largest EVM ecosystems for Web3 fundraising.
author: Cryptool
